message:
feat(connectors): add doctor diagnostics and self-check to Discord, Google Drive, and Slack

Implement the FCP doctor protocol across all three connectors so that
`fwc doctor` can report per-connector health in a structured, machine-
readable format. Each connector's doctor handler runs a series of
progressive checks (credential presence → API reachability → service-
specific validation) and returns a DoctorReport with individual check
results.

Discord connector (handle_doctor):
- Token presence check
- Token validity via get_current_user (reports username + ID)
- Bot account verification
- Gateway intents completeness (flags missing required intents)
- Network constraint evaluation
- Gateway WebSocket connection status
- Three test cases: unconfigured, fully healthy, and missing intents

Google Drive connector (handle_doctor + handle_self_check):
- Client configuration check
- API reachability via about endpoint (reports user display name)
- Storage quota reporting (used/limit or unlimited)
- New handle_self_check with SelfCheckReport: ok/degraded/failed
  based on health_check result with retryable error distinction
- Doctor and self-check wired into message dispatch ("doctor",
  "self_check" routes)
- Three test cases: unconfigured doctor, unconfigured self-check,
  configured doctor

Slack connector (handle_self_check):
- Token validation via auth.test
- Scope completeness check against REQUIRED_SCOPES
- Structured SelfCheckReport with team/user/scope details
- Retryable vs permanent error classification
- Two test cases: unconfigured and valid-token with mock server

Also adds DoctorReport and DoctorCheck types to Discord and Google
Drive type modules (Slack uses the core SelfCheckReport directly).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -116,6 +116,7 @@ async fn handle_message(connector: &mut DiscordConnector, message: &str) -> serd
         "configure" => connector.handle_configure(params).await,
         "handshake" => connector.handle_handshake(params).await,
         "health" => connector.handle_health().await,
+        "doctor" => connector.handle_doctor().await,
         "self_check" => connector.handle_self_check().await,
         "introspect" => connector.handle_introspect().await,
         "invoke" => connector.handle_invoke(params).await,

@@ -87,6 +87,8 @@ async fn handle_message(connector: &mut DriveConnector, message: &str) -> serde_
         "configure" => connector.handle_configure(params).await,
         "handshake" => connector.handle_handshake(params).await,
         "health" => connector.handle_health().await,
+        "doctor" => connector.handle_doctor().await,
+        "self_check" => connector.handle_self_check().await,
         "introspect" => connector.handle_introspect().await,
         "invoke" => connector.handle_invoke(params).await,
         "simulate" => connector.handle_simulate(params).await,

@@ -114,6 +114,7 @@ async fn handle_message(connector: &mut SlackConnector, message: &str) -> serde_
         "handshake" => connector.handle_handshake(params).await,
         "health" => connector.handle_health().await,
         "doctor" => connector.handle_doctor().await,
+        "self_check" => connector.handle_self_check().await,
         "introspect" => connector.handle_introspect().await,
         "subscribe" => connector.handle_subscribe(params).await,
         "invoke" => connector.handle_invoke(params).await,
